args.sql:
SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, kommunenummer, kommunennavn, lagretberegnetareal, ST_Area(omrade::geometry) AS computed_aream2
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301' AND (COALESCE(lagretberegnetareal, 0) > 5000 OR ST_Area(omrade::geometry) > 5000)
ORDER BY GREATEST(COALESCE(lagretberegnetareal, 0), ST_Area(omrade::geometry)) DESC
LIMIT 10;
